DOCUMENT.source-infobase-title: The Rules of the City of New York

RECORD.HEADING: Chapter 3500: Referenced Standards
RECORD.PARA: Chapter 3500: Referenced Standards

RECORD.HEADING: § 3500-01 American Concrete Institute (ACI) 318 – Building Code Requirements for Structural Concrete amendment. [Repealed]
RECORD.PARA: § 3500-01 American Concrete Institute (ACI) 318 – Building Code Requirements for Structural Concrete amendment. [Repealed]
(Repealed City Record 11/15/2023, eff. 12/15/2023) [ALP S-092]

RECORD.HEADING: § 3500-02 American National Standards Institute (ANSI) A10.4 – Safety Requirements for Personnel Hoists Amendment. [Repealed]
RECORD.PARA: § 3500-02 American National Standards Institute (ANSI) A10.4 – Safety Requirements for Personnel Hoists Amendment. [Repealed]
(Repealed City Record 11/15/2023, eff. 12/15/2023) [ALP S-092]

RECORD.HEADING: § 3500-03 Referenced Standards.
RECORD.PARA: § 3500-03 Referenced Standards.
Pursuant to § 28-103.19 of the New York City Administrative Code, delete and replace the following reference standards as follows: [ALP S-092]

Reference standards ANSI A118.1 and ANSI A118.4 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code, are hereby deleted and new ANSI A118.1 and ANSI A118.4 are added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: American National Standards Institute25 West 43rd Street, Fourth FloorNew York, NY 10036
American National Standard Specifications for Dry-Set Cement Mortar
American National Standard Specifications for Modified Dry-Set Cement Mortar

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard ASABE EP 559.1 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code, is hereby deleted and a new ASBE EP 559.1 is added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: American Society of Agricultural and Biological Engineers2950 Niles RoadSt. Joseph, MI 49085
Design Requirements and Bending Properties for Mechanically-Laminated Wood Assemblies

RECORD.PARA: Reference standards ASCE/SEI 8, ASCE/SEI 29, and ASCE/SEI 32 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code, are hereby deleted and new ASCE/SEI 8, ASCE/SEI 29, and ASCE/SEI 32 are added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: American Society of Civil EngineersStructural Engineering Institute1801 Alexander Bell DriveReston, VA 20191-4400
Specification for the Design of Cold-formed Stainless Steel Structural Members
Standard Calculation Methods for Structural Fire Protection
Design and Construction of Frost-Protected Shallow Foundations

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard ASME 17.5 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code, is hereby deleted and a new ASME 17.5 is added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: American Society of Mechanical EngineersTwo Park AvenueNew York, NY 10016-5990

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard AWPA M4 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code is hereby deleted and a new AWPA M4 is added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: American Wood Protection AssociationP.O. Box 361784Birmingham, AL 35236-1784
Standard for the Care of Preservative-Treated Wood Products

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard AWS D1.4/D1.4M as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code is hereby deleted and a new AWS D1.4/D1.4M is added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: American Welding Society8669 NW 36 Street, #130Doral, FL 33166
Structural Welding Code — Steel Reinforcing Bars

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard CPA A208.1 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code is hereby deleted and a new CPA A208.1 is added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Composite Panel Association19465 Deerfield Avenue, Suite 306Leesburg, VA 20176

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard DASMA 115 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code is hereby deleted and a new DASMA 115 is added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Door and Access Systems Manufacturers Association International1300 Summer AvenueCleveland, OH 44115-2851
Standard Method for Testing Sectional Doors, Rolling Doors and Flexible Doors: Determination of Structural Performance Under Missile Impact and Cyclic Wind Pressure

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard FM 4474 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code is hereby deleted and a new FM 4474 is added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Factory Mutual Global ResearchStandards Laboratories Department1301 Atwood Avenue, P.O. Box 7500Johnston, RI 02919
American National Standard for Evaluating the Simulated Wind Uplift Resistance of Roof Assemblies Using Static Positive and/or Negative Differential Pressures

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard NAAMM FP 1001 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code is hereby deleted and a new NAMM FP 1001 is added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: National Association of Architectural Metal Manufacturers800 Roosevelt Road, Bldg. C, Suite 312Glen Ellyn, IL 60137
Guide Specifications for Design of Metal Flagpoles

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard TIA-222-H as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code is hereby deleted and a new TIA-222-H is added to read as follows: [ALP S-092]

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Telecommunications Industry Association1320 N. Courthouse RoadArlington, VA 22201-3834
Structural Standard for Antenna Supporting Structures, Antennas and Small Wind Turbine Support Structures

RECORD.PARA: Reference standard TMS 216 as added by Section BC 3502 of the New York City Building Code is hereby deleted. [ALP S-092]
(Added City Record 11/15/2023, eff. 12/15/2023) [ALP S-092]
